title: callitriche × vigens
intro: Callitriche × vigens is a hybrid plant species, resulting from the cross between Callitriche stagnalis and Callitriche hermaphroditica, both aquatic plants. Traditionally, Callitriche × vigens has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating various gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea and stomach ulcers. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting digestion due to its rich content of vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants. Callitriche × vigens can be prepared as an infusion or decoction, and in some cultures, it's used as a herbal remedy, although its efficacy and safety have not been extensively scientifically proven.
